name: vscode-free-code
description: Sidebar chat for VS Code and Cursor backed by free-code RPC mode

commands.title: Free Code: Insert file paths in chat
Free Code: Open visible browser with agent
Free Code: Export conversation to Markdown

free-code.executablePath.description: Path to the free-code executable. Default `free-code` uses PATH; if the workspace root contains `packages/coding-agent/dist/cli.js` (after `npm run build` in the monorepo), that file is used automatically so the RPC agent matches a local build.

free-code.cwd.description: Optional working directory for the agent. If empty, uses the first workspace folder.

free-code.env.description: Extra environment variables for the free-code child process (merged over the extension host env). Use for Vertex: GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT, GOOGLE_CLOUD_LOCATION, or GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS. The GUI app does not inherit shell exports from a terminal session.

free-code.noExtensions.description: If true, spawns `free-code --no-extensions` (faster, no agent extensions or MCP tool discovery). If false (default), matches the terminal CLI: extensions and MCP load so `/tools` and `/pick-tools` can list the same groups as the TUI (requires a current `free-code` build).

scripts.package: npm run build && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-package-secrets slack
